title: Include PK and FK Fields in ERD Node Detail Pop-out Panel
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see primary key and foreign key fields in the right-side pop-out panel when I expand an ERD node's details, so that I can review key relationships without leaving the diagram.
description:
## Context
When a user clicks the expand arrow on an ERD node, a right-side pop-out panel shows field details. Previously, PK and FK fields were not included in this panel.

## Behavior
The pop-out detail panel now includes primary key and foreign key fields alongside other fields, giving a complete view of the entity's structure.
acceptance_criteria: Primary key fields appear in the right-side pop-out panel
Foreign key fields appear in the right-side pop-out panel
PK and FK fields are visually distinguished (e.g., icons or labels)
All other fields continue to display as before
ux_changes: PK and FK fields are now included in the ERD node detail right pop-out panel when a user expands a node.
implementation_notes: Updated the pop-out panel data fetch to include PK and FK fields in the field list.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the feature and shared a screenshot for review.
